rationale.R1.6: The agent improved writing polish by removing redundancies and tightening phrasing, though not a full copy-edit.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is flagged but without detailed confidence marks for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays strictly within the agreed scope without any drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced during edits.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are traced, minor ones less so.
